ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emotions" (
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emotion */,
  "emotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the emotion (e.g., Excited, Anxious) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emotion */,
  "intensity_scale" INTEGER /* Intensity scale of the emotion (1-10) */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code associated with the emotion for visual representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase (e.g., Before, During, After) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the communication phase */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the communication phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotion_data_collection" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the data */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the communication phase */,
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emotion reported */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of responses for the specified emotion */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "intensity" INTEGER /* Intensity of the emotion reported */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotion_data_collection_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES communication_phases ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotion_data_collection_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotion_data_collection_emotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("emotion_id") REFERENCES emotions ("emotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trainee, trainer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the session */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer conducting the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date when the training session took place */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the user post-session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., group, one-on-one) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the report belongs */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "detailed_report" TEXT /* Detailed analysis report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., emotional, performance) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or roles the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trainee, trainer, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* The content of the feedback */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating for the session (1-5) */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_emotion_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emotion history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose emotion is being tracked */,
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emotion recorded */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the communication phase */,
  "emotion_state" INTEGER /* State of the emotion (e.g., score from survey) */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the emotion was recorded */,
  "intensity" INTEGER /* Intensity of the emotion recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_emotion_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_emotion_history_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES communication_phases ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_emotion_history_emotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("emotion_id") REFERENCES emotions ("emotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session being analyzed */,
  "average_emotion" REAL /* Average emotion score during the session */,
  "highest_emotion" INTEGER /* Emotion recorded with the highest score */,
  "lowest_emotion" INTEGER /* Emotion recorded with the lowest score */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., emotional, performance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_analysis_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)
